CustomField.formula: IF( ISNULL( CreditWeight__c ), IF(ISNULL( ClientAnswerWeight_free__c ) , WeightSum__c * IF(ISBLANK( QuantityNumeric__c ),1, QuantityNumeric__c ) , ClientAnswerWeight_free__c * IF(ISBLANK( QuantityNumeric__c ),1, QuantityNumeric__c )) , CreditWeight__c * IF(ISBLANK( QuantityNumeric__c ),1, QuantityNumeric__c ) )
CustomField.label: 重量合計
